Safety Inquiries

On this page

✦ Windows ​


ⓘ You must properly extract, or the following files will not open and will appear broken.
Ensure that you have read and understood the following instructions before you begin downloading: How To Extract Guide

Password: star

Downloads are hosted on Google Drive and MediaFire to maintain this project in budget. To ensure a safe experience and avoid accidental clicks on misleading pop-up ads with MediaFire, we HIGHLY recommend using a trusted adblocker before clicking any links.

Looking for an older release? Check the archive.

Table Of Contents ​

✧ Software

✧ Adobe Plugins

✧ OFX Plugins

Browse through the video tutorials for guidance if needed. Most files will also include written instructions in the form of a txt/pdf file.

✧ Software ​

Interested in Adobe software? Consider GenP. ​

With GenP, you'll be able to patch Adobe applications installed directly from the Creative Cloud App, giving you an unlimited selection of apps, faster updates, and a stronger since of security due to manual control.

The installers listed below are typically more convenient for beginners and quicker to install, ideal for those only interested in a select few Adobe programs.

After Effects ​

After Effects 2026.0

After Effects 2025.6

After Effects 2024.5

After Effects 2023.2

After Effects 2021 (v18.0)

After Effects 2020 (v17.7)

Media Encoder 2023.2

Media Encoder 2021

Media Encoder 2020

✧ Adobe Plugins ​

The following plugins are compatible with After Effects, with select plugins also supporting Premiere Pro when officially supported by the developer.

BorisFX ​

Continuum 2026.0.1

Sapphire 2026.0

Mocha Pro 2026.0.1

Silhouette 2025.5

Maxon ​

Red Giant 2026.3.0Includes Magic Bullet Suite, Trapcode Suite, VFX Suite, and Universe.

RE:VisionFX ​

Twixtor 8.1.0

RE:VisionFX Bundle 25.08Includes all plugins by RE:VisionFX (full list here), including RSMB 6.4.4 & Twixtor 8.0.7 and its Pro versions.

RE:VisionFX Bundle 23.08Includes all plugins by RE:VisionFX (full list here), including RSMB 6.4.1 & Twixtor 7.5.5 and its Pro versions.

Video Copilot ​

Element 3D 2.2.3

Heat Distortion 1.0.31

Pro Shaders 1

Pro Shaders 2

Optical Flares 1.3.8

Saber

Twitch

VC Color Vibrance

AutoKroma ​

AfterCodecs 1.12.1 (2026 compatible)

Influx 1.6.1 (2026 compatible)

AutoKroma 2025.7 BundleIncludes AfterCodecs 1.20.0, BRAW Studio 3.3.8, PlumePack 2.4.6 and Influx Premium 1.5.7.

Zaebects ​

JPEG Glitch 1.0.4

Modulation 2.1

Physarum v1.3

Signal 1.2.3

Plugin Everything ​

AutoFill 2.0.2

Cartoon Moblur 1.6.3

Deep Glow 2 1.1.0

Deep Glow 1.6.6

DiscoText 1.2.6

Displacer Pro 1.5.0

Extrude

Shadow Studio 3 1.0.7

TextBox 2 1.2

TextDelay 1.7.5

Quick Chromatic Aberration

ElementSupply Co ​

Glitchify

Polytrace

Rowbyte ​

Rowbyte Bundle 2025.8Includes Stipple 1.0.3, Plexus 3.2.9, Fast Bokeh 2.1.3, Buena Depth Cue 2.5.8, Aura 1.2.6, and TVDistortion bundle 2.7.5 (Data Glitch, Bad TV, TVPixel, Dot Pixels, Separate RGB.)

Pixel Sorter Studio ​

Pixel Sorter Studio BundleIncludes Pixel Sorter 3.1.0 & 2.2, PixelGalactic 1.0.2, MotionMosh 1.2.2, MotionExtractor 1.0.0, MadPainter 1.1.0, HydroChrome 1.1.1, Glasswork 1.1.2 and BallPoint 1.2.0.BallPoint 1.2.1 (Crash Fix)

Crossphere ​

Crossphere Plugins BundleIncludes Bokeh v1.4.0, Fractal Noise 3D v1.5.4, PixelBlend Accelerator v1.2.3, Power Cylinder v1.1.6, Power Droste v1.0.0, Power Hyperboloid v1.0.2, Power Sphere v1.1.9.Bokeh 1.4.1

Mettle ​

Mettle Plugins Bundle 2024.2

Satori ​

Satori BundleIncludes Pixel Melt 1.0.1, Block Swap 1.5.1, Curve Tracer 1.1.0, Geometric Filter 1.2.0, Pixelocybe 1.3.0, Pixel Stretch 1.6.0, Recursive Mosaic 1.3.0, Split Blur 1.5.0, and Time Bend 1.0.1.

Irrealix ​

Irrealix Bundle 260215.1Includes DustTransition, FreeGradient, Gaussian Splatting, LoopFlow, MosaicArt, Nebulosity, Potok, RekaGrid, Stretch, and Volna.

Blace Plugins ​

Depth Scanner v2 2.4.42

I Ate Mushrooms 6.24

Mask Prompter 3 3.0.3

FilmConvert ​

FilmConvert BundleSupports Nitrate, Cinematch, Hazy and Halation.

Vimager ​

Vimager Bundle 1.6.60209Includes SpeedX, ScaleUp, StyleX, ContrastUp, ClearPlus, ColorX, DeepClear, FacePro.

BAO ​

BAO Plugins Bundle 2025.5Includes Boa v1.6.0, Bones v1.5.10, Distortion Selector v2.4, Dynamic Comp v2.7, Joint v1.0.4, Layer Sculptor v1.2.3, Mask 3D Warper v1.6.2, Mask Avenger v2.7.5, Mask Brush v1.9.18, Perspective Changer v1.2.

Baskl ​

Baskl SuiteIncludes AI Relight 1.1, AI Color Match Pro 1.3.4, AI Depth of Field 1.1, Diffusae 2.0.2, Quick Matte 1.0.2, Concept Buddy 1.0.9 and Vision 1.0.1.

BGRA Entertainment ​

L3tt3rM4pp3r2 v2.8

Retro Dither 1.10

Frischluft ​

FL Plugins BundleIncludes FL Glow, Flair, Lenscare, Depth of Field, Amiga Rules, Box Blur, Glas Sphere, Mosaic Plane, Highlight, Radical Blur, Volumetrics, Out of Focus.

Dragoy ​

Bevelizer 1.0.1

Tracery 1.1

AndrewYang ​

AndrewYang Bundle 260215Includes YY_Ramp, YY_HexTex, YY_MagicKey, YY_ShockRing, and YY_Voronoi.

ProductionCrate ​

Crates Godrays & Lightwrap

LaForge Suite 1.4.81Includes over 25+ ProductionCrate plugins (full list here).

Color Llama 1.1.0
